name: Mother Spider
desc: If you have only Insect-Type monsters in your Graveyard, you can send 2 face-up Defense Position monsters your opponent controls to the Graveyard and Special Summon this card from your hand.
mnst_eff: If you have only Insect-Type monsters in your Graveyard, you can send 2 face-up Defense Position monsters your opponent controls to the Graveyard and Special Summon this card from your hand.
eff: If you have only Insect-Type monsters in your Graveyard, you can send 2 face-up Defense Position monsters your opponent controls to the Graveyard and Special Summon this card from your hand.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for Special Summon
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Requires having only specific Type in Graveyard
